title: Learning
description: Use this area for source ingestion, synthesis, topic development, and updating your mental models.
focus: Pull one raw source through the full loop: ingest, summarize, link, and promote the durable takeaway.
prompts: Based on my recent source notes and 20_Areas/Learning, extract the three most durable takeaways and suggest where they should be linked.
Compare the latest source note against existing Learning notes and identify what is genuinely new.
Rewrite the current learning thread as a concise synthesis note for future reuse.
checkpoints: Takeaways are promoted into durable notes rather than left in raw captures.
Links connect source notes, synthesis notes, and affected areas.

nextActions.text: Choose one recent source to ingest fully.
Write or refresh one synthesis note.
Link the takeaway into the relevant area or project.
